creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175503
SVN patch to update devel/radare2 to v.0.10.6

Hi,

Here is patch to update devel/radare2 to v.0.10.6. It also introduces folder "files" to fix compilation issue of this version, but fix is already committed in upstream. 

https://github.com/radare/radare2/commit/008039902160731a0c02ca027af4a75766297097
